scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start -w backend" "npm run start -w frontend"
